arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid could miss out on Spanish gem to Newcastle United
arts.sum: La Liga’s two biggest clubs could be pipped to the post in the race for one of Spanish football’s standout up-and-coming talents. That’s according to Diario Sport, citing Mail Online,…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Accomplishes Feat Not Even Cristiano Ronaldo Did in His Debut Real Madrid Season
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé scored against Barcelona and Atlético Madrid in his debut Real Madrid season unlike Cristiano Ronaldo.

arts.ttl: Man City fans to take aim at Vinícius Jr. with banner during Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: A group of Manchester City supporters have prepared a special banner, to be unveiled during the club’s meeting with Real Madrid later this evening. The banner in question will be…

Despite an inconsistent season, Madrid’s performance has been far from disastrous: they lead La Liga and narrowly missed out on the Champions League Round of 16. Yet, despite this financial disparity, Madrid have outperformed City in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Man City fans set to mock Vinicius Jnr's Ballon d'Or snub with BRUTAL banner ahead of Real Madrid clash - and it's got Liam Gallagher's backing!
arts.sum: A group of Manchester City fans will unveil a banner mocking Vinicius Jnr before their battle with Real Madrid after he was beaten to the Ballon d'Or by Rodri last year.

arts.ttl: Barcelona and Real Madrid credited with interest in 16-year-old MLS wonderkid
arts.sum: As the years go by, there is a steadily increasing flow of talent from North America to Europe in terms of football, and increasingly, Europe’s giants are extending their scouting efforts to the USA and Canada. The latest to pop up on their radar is New York Red Bulls winger-cum-forward Julian Hall. The 16-year-old, who […] The post Barcelona and Real Madrid credited with interest in 16-year-old MLS wonderkid appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe given blunt ultimatum ahead of huge Man City showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Kylian Mbappe are bidding to knock Manchester City out of the Champions League - and Steve McManaman thinks the match could also have Ballon d'Or repercussions

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti explains curious exile of 10-year Real Madrid veteran
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti has lifted the lid on why experienced centre-back Jesus Vallejo has barely had a sniff of game time this season.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Newcastle to beat Barcelona, Los Blancos for Spain Under-19 international?
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly favourites to sign a Spain Under-19 international in the summer, edging out Barcelona and Real Madrid in the process.

arts.ttl: Man City and Real Madrid meet in Champions League with one of Europe's giants facing elimination
arts.sum: “We’ve not been consistent, when what’s defined the team over the last decade has been we are an incredible machine every three days, otherwise we cannot win six Premier Leagues in seven years or win the incredible trophies we have won,” he said. Guardiola said he did not know what to expect from his team after a troubled season has left it in fifth place in the Premier League, 15 points behind leader Liverpool.
